title: Amazon Basics Hardboard Clipboard - 6-Pack, Brown
features: Letter-size clipboard (6 pack) with brown fiberboard base provides a hard, portable writing surface; holds up to 100 sheets of 75g/m² paper
Steel clip with spring and PP corner ensures a secure grip; low-profile clip allows for easily stacking multiple clipboards together
Smooth surfaces and rounded edges and corners provides a comfortable hold
Retractable hanging loop with 1.27 cm diametre hole; loop extends from the top for use and stows away when not needed
description: From the manufacturer Amazon Basics Hardboard Clipboard 6-Pack Providing a portable writing surface, this pack of letter-size clipboards from Amazon Basics makes a useful addition to a variety of offices and organizations. The versatile clipboard can help keep day-to-day tasks running smoothly and efficiently. Each clipboard holds up to 100 sheets of 75g/m² paper, and it offers a smooth brown fiberboard surface with rounded corners and edges for a comfortable hold. Dimensions Each clipboard measures 31.75 by 22.86 by 1.27 cm (LxWxH). Details Letter-size clipboard Holds up to 100 sheets of 75g/m² paper Low-profile metal clip (allows for stacking multiple clipboards) Spring closure and rubberized clip corners for a secure grip on paper Brown fiberboard base Rounded edges and corners for a comfortable hold Retractable loop for hanging Low-Profile Metal Clip The clipboard features a steel clip with spring and PP corner, which protect paper while keeping it securely in place. The clip’s low-profile design allows for easily stacking multiple clipboards together for space-saving storage. Hole for Hanging The clipboard provides a small metal tab with a 1.27-cm-diameter hole for hanging the clipboard from a specific location. Simply attach a piece of string or hang it directly from a hook (not included). The metal tab extends out from the top of the clipboard and can be pushed down and out of the way when not in use.
